display_text: Bottomless Chalice, Tier 3: Neutral item providing a charge-based mana restore and healing over time. Using a charge grants 200 health and 70 mana over 3 seconds. Stores up to 6 charges, gaining 1 charge every 10 seconds, with a maximum of 1 charge per enemy hero kill. Passively grants +40 Intelligence, +200 health, +70 mana, +30 movement speed, and the stored Rune duration buff. Stats: CD per charge use: N/A, Max Charges: 6, Recharge Time: 10s, Int: +40, HP: +200, Mana: +70, MS: +30.
